parameters.query:
WITH target AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT v.*,r.review_id
  FROM drama.shot_videos v
  JOIN drama.review_tasks r ON r.project_id=v.project_id AND r.entity_type='shot_video' AND r.entity_id=v.shot_video_id
  WHERE v.project_id=$1::text
    AND ($2::text IS NULL OR r.review_id=$2::text)
    AND ($3::text IS NULL OR v.shot_video_id=$3::text)
    AND ($4::text IS NULL OR v.shot_id=$4::text)
  ORDER BY v.generation_version DESC LIMIT 1
),
eligible AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT * FROM target
  WHERE $5::text IN ('approved','rejected')
    AND ($5::text<>'approved' OR (status='succeeded' AND auto_qc_status IN ('passed','warning')))
    AND ($5::text<>'rejected' OR NULLIF(btrim($7::text),'') IS NOT NULL)
),
reviewed AS (
  UPDATE drama.review_tasks r
  SET review_status=$5::text,review_comment=NULLIF($6::text,''),rejection_reason=NULLIF($7::text,''),
      prompt_adjustment=NULLIF($8::text,''),reviewed_at=now()
  FROM eligible e WHERE r.review_id=e.review_id RETURNING r.*
),
video AS (
  UPDATE drama.shot_videos v
  SET review_status=$5::text,review_comment=NULLIF($6::text,''),rejection_reason=NULLIF($7::text,''),
      prompt_adjustment=NULLIF($8::text,'')
  FROM eligible e,reviewed r WHERE v.shot_video_id=e.shot_video_id RETURNING v.*
),
required AS (
  SELECT sh.shot_id FROM drama.storyboards b
  JOIN drama.storyboard_shots sh ON sh.storyboard_id=b.storyboard_id
  WHERE b.storyboard_id=(SELECT storyboard_id FROM target) AND b.status='approved'
    AND sh.status IN ('approved','ready')
),
flags AS (
  SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM video) changed,
    EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM required) AND NOT EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM required q WHERE NOT EXISTS(
        SELECT 1 FROM drama.shot_videos sv
        WHERE sv.shot_id=q.shot_id AND sv.is_current AND sv.status='succeeded'
          AND sv.auto_qc_status IN ('passed','warning') AND sv.review_status='approved'
      )
    ) all_video_approved
),
audio AS (
  SELECT EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es
      WHERE es.project_id=$1::text AND es.episode_id=(SELECT episode_id FROM target) AND es.status='approved'
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es JOIN drama.dialogues d ON d.episode_id=es.episode_id
      WHERE es.project_id=$1::text AND es.episode_id=(SELECT episode_id FROM target) AND es.status='approved'
        AND NOT EXISTS(
          SELECT 1 FROM drama.dialogue_audio da
          WHERE da.dialogue_id=d.dialogue_id AND da.is_current AND da.status='succeeded'
            AND da.auto_qc_status IN ('passed','warning')
        )
    )
    AND EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_audio_plans ap
      WHERE ap.project_id=$1::text AND ap.episode_id=(SELECT episode_id FROM target)
        AND ap.status IN ('ready','completed')
    ) audio_done
),
state AS (
  SELECT f.*,a.audio_done,(f.all_video_approved AND a.audio_done) full_done
  FROM flags f CROSS JOIN audio a
),
project_update AS (
  UPDATE drama.projects p
  SET current_stage=CASE
        WHEN s.full_done THEN 'stage_4_completed'
        WHEN NOT s.changed THEN p.current_stage
        WHEN $5::text='rejected' THEN 'shot_video_review'
        WHEN s.all_video_approved AND p.current_stage IN ('voice_audio','voice_profiles_created','voice_profile_review','voice_profiles_locked','tts_processing','dialogue_audio_generated','audio_processing','audio_review','audio_ready','audio_plan_completed') THEN p.current_stage
        WHEN s.all_video_approved THEN 'shot_videos_approved'
        ELSE 'shot_video_review'
      END,
      status=CASE
        WHEN s.full_done THEN 'stage_4_completed'
        WHEN NOT s.changed THEN p.status
        WHEN $5::text='rejected' THEN 'waiting_shot_video_review'
        WHEN s.all_video_approved AND p.current_stage IN ('voice_audio','voice_profiles_created','voice_profile_review','voice_profiles_locked','tts_processing','dialogue_audio_generated','audio_processing','audio_review','audio_ready','audio_plan_completed') THEN p.status
        WHEN s.all_video_approved THEN 'running'
        ELSE 'waiting_shot_video_review'
      END
  FROM state s WHERE p.project_id=$1::text RETURNING p.current_stage,p.status
)
SELECT (SELECT changed FROM state) success,$1::text project_id,
  (SELECT episode_id FROM target) episode_id,(SELECT shot_id FROM target) shot_id,
  (SELECT shot_video_id FROM target) shot_video_id,$2::text review_id,$5::text review_status,
  (SELECT all_video_approved FROM state) all_video_approved,
  (SELECT full_done FROM state) stage4_complete,
  (SELECT current_stage FROM project_update) project_stage,
  CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM target) THEN 'REVIEW_NOT_FOUND'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM eligible) AND $5::text='approved' THEN 'SHOT_VIDEO_NOT_APPROVED'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM eligible) THEN 'BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED'
    ELSE NULL
  END error_code,
  CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM target) THEN 'shot video review task was not found'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM eligible) AND $5::text='approved' THEN 'shot video must succeed automatic QC before approval'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM eligible) THEN 'review request failed validation'
    ELSE NULL
  END error_message,$9::text trace_id;

WITH cancelled_tasks AS (
  UPDATE drama.video_generation_tasks
  SET status='cancelled',completed_at=now(),next_poll_at=NULL,
      error_code='CANCELLED_BY_USER',error_message='cancelled by explicit workflow request'
  WHERE project_id=$1::text AND ($2::text IS NULL OR episode_id=$2::text)
    AND ($3::text IS NULL OR shot_id=$3::text) AND status IN ('pending','submitting','processing')
  RETURNING task_id
),
failed_versions AS (
  UPDATE drama.shot_videos
  SET status='failed',auto_qc_status='failed',
      auto_qc_report=jsonb_build_object('status','failed','error_code','CANCELLED_BY_USER','message','cancelled by explicit workflow request')
  WHERE project_id=$1::text AND ($2::text IS NULL OR episode_id=$2::text)
    AND ($3::text IS NULL OR shot_id=$3::text) AND status IN ('pending','generating','processing')
  RETURNING shot_video_id
),
workflow_cancel AS (
  UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks
  SET status='cancelled',completed_at=now(),error_code='CANCELLED_BY_USER',
      error_message='cancelled by explicit workflow request'
  WHERE project_id=$1::text AND workflow_stage='image_to_video' AND status='running'
  RETURNING task_id
),
project_update AS (
  UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage='stage_4_failed',status='cancelled'
  WHERE project_id=$1::text RETURNING project_id
)
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
  'success',true,'project_id',$1::text,'episode_id',$2::text,'shot_id',$3::text,
  'trace_id',$4::text,'stage','image_to_video','status','cancelled',
  'data_ref',jsonb_build_object('entity_type','video_tasks','entity_id',$3::text),
  'metrics',jsonb_build_object('cancelled_tasks',(SELECT count(*) FROM cancelled_tasks),'cancelled_versions',(SELECT count(*) FROM failed_versions)),
  'error',NULL
) response;

INSERT INTO drama.workflow_tasks(
  task_id,trace_id,project_id,workflow_stage,action,entity_type,entity_id,generation_version,
  idempotency_key,status,max_retries,input_data,started_at
) VALUES(
  $1::text,$2::text,$3::text,'image_to_video',$4::text,
  CASE WHEN $5::text IS NULL THEN 'episode' ELSE 'shot' END,COALESCE($5::text,$6::text),
  $7::int,$8::text,'running',$9::int,$10::jsonb,now()
)
ON CONFLICT(idempotency_key) DO UPDATE SET
  trace_id=EXCLUDED.trace_id,
  action=EXCLUDED.action,
  input_data=EXCLUDED.input_data,
  status=CASE
    WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='completed' AND $4::text='resume' THEN 'running'
    WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4::text IN ('retry','regenerate','resume')
      AND drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count<drama.workflow_tasks.max_retries THEN 'running'
    ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.status END,
  retry_count=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4::text IN ('retry','regenerate','resume')
    AND drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count<drama.workflow_tasks.max_retries THEN drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count+1
    ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count END,
  error_code=CASE WHEN (drama.workflow_tasks.status='completed' AND $4::text='resume')
      OR (drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4::text IN ('retry','regenerate','resume'))
    THEN NULL ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.error_code END,
  error_message=CASE WHEN (drama.workflow_tasks.status='completed' AND $4::text='resume')
      OR (drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4::text IN ('retry','regenerate','resume'))
    THEN NULL ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.error_message END,
  started_at=CASE WHEN (drama.workflow_tasks.status='completed' AND $4::text='resume')
      OR (drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4::text IN ('retry','regenerate','resume'))
    THEN now() ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.started_at END,
  completed_at=CASE WHEN (drama.workflow_tasks.status='completed' AND $4::text='resume')
      OR (drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed' AND $4::text IN ('retry','regenerate','resume'))
    THEN NULL ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.completed_at END
RETURNING status,output_data,$11::jsonb request;

parameters.jsCode:
if($json.status!=='running')throw new Error('DUPLICATE_VIDEO_TASK_RUNNING: an equivalent image-to-video workflow is already running');
return [{json:$json.request}];

parameters.query:
WITH project_row AS (
  SELECT * FROM drama.projects WHERE project_id=$1::text
),
episode_row AS (
  SELECT e.* FROM drama.episode_outlines e JOIN project_row p ON p.project_id=e.project_id
  WHERE e.episode_id=$2::text
),
script_row AS (
  SELECT s.* FROM drama.episode_scripts s JOIN episode_row e ON e.episode_id=s.episode_id
  WHERE s.status='approved' ORDER BY s.version DESC LIMIT 1
),
board_row AS (
  SELECT b.* FROM drama.storyboards b JOIN script_row s ON s.script_id=b.script_id
  WHERE b.status='approved' ORDER BY b.version DESC LIMIT 1
),
shot_rows AS (
  SELECT sh.*,b.storyboard_id,b.version storyboard_version,
    i.storyboard_image_id,i.generation_version image_generation_version,
    i.source_storyboard_version,i.visual_style_id,i.character_profile_ids,i.costume_ids,
    i.location_profile_id,i.prop_ids,i.reference_asset_ids,i.image_asset_id,
    i.final_prompt image_prompt,i.negative_prompt image_negative_prompt,
    i.image_url,i.storage_url image_storage_url,i.status image_status,
    i.auto_qc_status image_qc_status,i.review_status image_review_status,
    v.shot_video_id current_video_id,v.generation_version current_video_version,
    v.status current_video_status,v.auto_qc_status current_video_qc_status,
    v.review_status current_video_review_status,
    t.task_id current_task_id,t.status current_task_status,
    CASE WHEN i.storyboard_image_id IS NULL THEN false ELSE
      NOT EXISTS(
        SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(i.character_profile_ids,'[]'::jsonb)) pid
        WHERE NOT EXISTS(
          SELECT 1 FROM drama.character_visual_profiles cp
          WHERE cp.profile_id=pid AND cp.project_id=$1::text
            AND cp.lock_status='locked' AND cp.review_status='approved'
        )
      )
      AND NOT EXISTS(
        SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(i.costume_ids,'[]'::jsonb)) cid
        WHERE NOT EXISTS(
          SELECT 1 FROM drama.character_costumes cc
          WHERE cc.costume_id=cid AND cc.project_id=$1::text
            AND cc.lock_status='locked' AND cc.review_status='approved'
        )
      )
      AND (i.location_profile_id IS NULL OR EXISTS(
        SELECT 1 FROM drama.location_visual_profiles lp
        WHERE lp.profile_id=i.location_profile_id AND lp.project_id=$1::text
          AND lp.lock_status='locked' AND lp.review_status='approved'
      ))
      AND NOT EXISTS(
        SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(i.prop_ids,'[]'::jsonb)) pid
        WHERE NOT EXISTS(
          SELECT 1 FROM drama.prop_visual_profiles pp
          WHERE pp.prop_id=pid AND pp.project_id=$1::text
            AND pp.lock_status='locked' AND pp.review_status='approved'
        )
      )
    END assets_locked
  FROM board_row b
  JOIN drama.storyboard_shots sh ON sh.storyboard_id=b.storyboard_id
    AND sh.status IN ('approved','ready')
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL(
    SELECT si.* FROM drama.storyboard_images si
    WHERE si.shot_id=sh.shot_id AND si.storyboard_id=b.storyboard_id AND si.is_current
      AND si.status='succeeded' AND si.review_status='approved'
      AND si.auto_qc_status IN ('passed','warning')
    ORDER BY si.generation_version DESC LIMIT 1
  ) i ON true
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL(
    SELECT sv.* FROM drama.shot_videos sv
    WHERE sv.shot_id=sh.shot_id AND sv.is_current
    ORDER BY sv.generation_version DESC LIMIT 1
  ) v ON true
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL(
    SELECT vt.* FROM drama.video_generation_tasks vt
    WHERE vt.shot_id=sh.shot_id AND vt.generation_version=$3::int
    ORDER BY vt.updated_at DESC,vt.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
  ) t ON true
  WHERE ($4::text IS NULL OR sh.shot_id=$4::text)
  ORDER BY sh.shot_order LIMIT $5::int
)
SELECT $6::jsonb request,
  (SELECT to_jsonb(p.*) FROM project_row p) project,
  (SELECT to_jsonb(e.*) FROM episode_row e) episode,
  (SELECT to_jsonb(s.*) FROM script_row s) script,
  (SELECT to_jsonb(b.*) FROM board_row b) storyboard,
  COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(sr.*) ORDER BY sr.shot_order) FROM shot_rows sr),'[]'::jsonb) shots;

nodes.name: Load Approved Images and Video State
Validate Media and Build Video Dispatch Items

parameters.query:
WITH old_version AS (
  UPDATE drama.shot_videos
  SET review_status=CASE WHEN $27::text='regenerate' THEN 'regenerating' ELSE review_status END
  WHERE project_id=$2::text AND shot_id=$5::text AND is_current
    AND generation_version<$8::int AND $27::text='regenerate'
  RETURNING shot_video_id
),
task_patch AS (
  UPDATE drama.video_generation_tasks
  SET response_payload=COALESCE(response_payload,'{}'::jsonb) ||
    CASE
      WHEN $9::text<>'mock' AND $22::text='succeeded' AND NULLIF($23::text,'') IS NOT NULL
      THEN jsonb_build_object('videos',jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object(
        'url',$23::text,'duration_seconds',$18::numeric,'aspect_ratio',$19::text,
        'resolution',($20::int)::text||'x'||($21::int)::text,'fps',$24::numeric
      )))
      ELSE '{}'::jsonb
    END
  WHERE task_id=$26::text
  RETURNING task_id,status
),
video AS (
  INSERT INTO drama.shot_videos(
    shot_video_id,project_id,episode_id,storyboard_id,shot_id,storyboard_image_id,
    source_image_generation_version,generation_version,provider,model,provider_task_id,
    video_prompt,negative_prompt,reference_image_url,reference_asset_ids,
    request_parameters,seed,requested_duration_seconds,aspect_ratio,width,height,fps,
    original_url,storage_url,status,auto_qc_status,auto_qc_report,review_status,is_current
  ) VALUES(
    $1::text,$2::text,$3::text,$4::text,$5::text,$6::text,$7::int,$8::int,$9::text,$10::text,
    NULLIF($11::text,''),$12::text,$13::text,$14::text,$15::jsonb,$16::jsonb,$17::bigint,
    $18::numeric,$19::text,$20::int,$21::int,$24::numeric,
    NULLIF($23::text,''),NULL,$25::text,$28::text,
    CASE WHEN $28::text='failed'
      THEN jsonb_build_object('status','failed','error',$29::jsonb)
      ELSE '{}'::jsonb END,
    'pending',true
  )
  ON CONFLICT(shot_id,generation_version) DO UPDATE SET
    provider=EXCLUDED.provider,model=EXCLUDED.model,provider_task_id=EXCLUDED.provider_task_id,
    video_prompt=EXCLUDED.video_prompt,negative_prompt=EXCLUDED.negative_prompt,
    reference_image_url=EXCLUDED.reference_image_url,
    reference_asset_ids=EXCLUDED.reference_asset_ids,
    request_parameters=EXCLUDED.request_parameters,seed=EXCLUDED.seed,
    requested_duration_seconds=EXCLUDED.requested_duration_seconds,
    aspect_ratio=EXCLUDED.aspect_ratio,width=EXCLUDED.width,height=EXCLUDED.height,fps=EXCLUDED.fps,
    original_url=COALESCE(EXCLUDED.original_url,drama.shot_videos.original_url),
    status=EXCLUDED.status,auto_qc_status=EXCLUDED.auto_qc_status,
    auto_qc_report=EXCLUDED.auto_qc_report,is_current=true
  RETURNING *
),
project_update AS (
  UPDATE drama.projects p
  SET current_stage=CASE
      WHEN p.current_stage IN ('voice_audio','voice_profiles_created','voice_profile_review','voice_profiles_locked','tts_processing','dialogue_audio_generated','audio_processing','audio_review','audio_ready','audio_plan_completed') THEN p.current_stage
      ELSE 'video_processing' END,
    status=CASE
      WHEN p.current_stage IN ('voice_audio','voice_profiles_created','voice_profile_review','voice_profiles_locked','tts_processing','dialogue_audio_generated','audio_processing','audio_review','audio_ready','audio_plan_completed') THEN p.status
      ELSE 'video_processing' END
  WHERE p.project_id=$2::text RETURNING p.project_id
)
SELECT (SELECT task_id FROM task_patch) task_id,
  (SELECT shot_video_id FROM video) shot_video_id,(SELECT status FROM video) status;

WITH board_row AS (
  SELECT b.storyboard_id
  FROM drama.storyboards b JOIN drama.episode_scripts s ON s.script_id=b.script_id
  WHERE b.project_id=$1::text AND b.episode_id=$2::text
    AND b.status='approved' AND s.status='approved'
  ORDER BY b.version DESC LIMIT 1
),
required AS (
  SELECT sh.shot_id FROM board_row b
  JOIN drama.storyboard_shots sh ON sh.storyboard_id=b.storyboard_id
  WHERE sh.status IN ('approved','ready') AND ($3::text IS NULL OR sh.shot_id=$3::text)
  ORDER BY sh.shot_order LIMIT $5::int
),
state AS (
  SELECT q.shot_id,
    EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM drama.shot_videos sv
      WHERE sv.shot_id=q.shot_id AND sv.is_current AND sv.status='succeeded'
        AND sv.auto_qc_status IN ('passed','warning') AND sv.review_status='approved'
    ) approved,
    EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM drama.shot_videos sv
      WHERE sv.shot_id=q.shot_id AND sv.is_current AND sv.status='succeeded'
        AND sv.auto_qc_status IN ('passed','warning')
    ) succeeded,
    (SELECT vt.status FROM drama.video_generation_tasks vt
      WHERE vt.shot_id=q.shot_id AND vt.generation_version=$4::int
      ORDER BY vt.updated_at DESC,vt.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) task_status
  FROM required q
),
audio AS (
  SELECT EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es
      WHERE es.project_id=$1::text AND es.episode_id=$2::text AND es.status='approved'
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es JOIN drama.dialogues d ON d.episode_id=es.episode_id
      WHERE es.project_id=$1::text AND es.episode_id=$2::text AND es.status='approved'
        AND NOT EXISTS(
          SELECT 1 FROM drama.dialogue_audio da
          WHERE da.dialogue_id=d.dialogue_id AND da.is_current
            AND da.status='succeeded' AND da.auto_qc_status IN ('passed','warning')
        )
    )
    AND EXISTS(
      SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_audio_plans ap
      WHERE ap.project_id=$1::text AND ap.episode_id=$2::text
        AND ap.status IN ('ready','completed')
    ) audio_done
)
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*)::int FROM state) required_count,
  (SELECT count(*)FILTER(WHERE approved)::int FROM state) approved_count,
  (SELECT count(*)FILTER(
    WHERE NOT approved AND (succeeded OR task_status IN ('pending','submitting','processing','succeeded'))
  )::int FROM state) active_count,
  (SELECT count(*)FILTER(
    WHERE NOT approved AND NOT succeeded AND task_status IN ('failed','timeout','cancelled')
  )::int FROM state) failed_count,
  (SELECT count(*)FILTER(WHERE NOT approved AND NOT succeeded AND task_status IS NULL)::int FROM state) missing_count,
  (SELECT audio_done FROM audio) audio_done,
  p.current_stage project_current_stage,p.status project_status
FROM drama.projects p WHERE p.project_id=$1::text;

options.queryReplacement: ={{[ $('Validate Image to Video Request').first().json.project_id, $('Validate Image to Video Request').first().json.episode_id, $('Validate Image to Video Request').first().json.shot_id, $('Validate Image to Video Request').first().json.generation_version, $('Validate Media and Build Video Dispatch Items').first().json.batch_limit ]}}

parameters.query:
WITH project_update AS (
  UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage=$1::text,status=$2::text
  WHERE project_id=$3::text RETURNING project_id
),
workflow_update AS (
  UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks
  SET status=$4::text,output_data=$5::jsonb,error_code=$6::text,
      error_message=$7::text,completed_at=now()
  WHERE idempotency_key=$8::text RETURNING output_data
)
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT output_data FROM workflow_update),$5::jsonb) response;

WITH existing AS (
  UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks
  SET status='failed',error_code=$1::text,error_message=$2::text,
      output_data=$3::jsonb,completed_at=now()
  WHERE idempotency_key=$4::text RETURNING task_id
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO drama.workflow_tasks(
    task_id,trace_id,project_id,workflow_stage,action,entity_type,entity_id,
    generation_version,idempotency_key,status,max_retries,input_data,output_data,
    error_code,error_message,completed_at
  )
  SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF($5::text,''),'task_video_failure_'||substr(md5($4::text),1,20)),
    COALESCE(NULLIF($6::text,''),'trace_video_failure'),p.project_id,'image_to_video',$7::text,
    CASE WHEN $8::text IS NULL THEN 'episode' ELSE 'shot' END,
    COALESCE($8::text,$9::text,''),GREATEST($10::int,1),$4::text,'failed',$11::int,
    '{}'::jsonb,$3::jsonb,$1::text,$2::text,now()
  FROM drama.projects p
  WHERE p.project_id=$12::text AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  ON CONFLICT(idempotency_key) DO UPDATE SET status='failed',
    output_data=EXCLUDED.output_data,error_code=EXCLUDED.error_code,
    error_message=EXCLUDED.error_message,completed_at=now()
  RETURNING task_id
),
project_update AS (
  UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage='stage_4_failed',status='stage_4_failed',
    error_message=$2::text WHERE project_id=$12::text RETURNING project_id
)
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
  'success',false,'project_id',$12::text,'episode_id',$9::text,'shot_id',$8::text,
  'trace_id',$6::text,'stage','image_to_video','status','stage_4_failed',
  'data_ref',NULL,'metrics','{}'::jsonb,'error',$3::jsonb
) response;

main.node: Load Approved Images and Video State
Validate Media and Build Video Dispatch Items
